rulings.Case Title: MINHALL, INC.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. RICHARD A. CHRISTENSEN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants Richard A. Christensen And Bds Couture, Inc. For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 18, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANTS RICHARD CHRISTENSEN and BDS COUTURE, INC.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees GRANTED. Defendants shall recover $139,934.11. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH MILES VS. MARC SHISHIDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joseph Miles Demurrer To First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 18, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MILES' Demurrer To First Amended Cross-Complaint continued to September 18, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the the optative cross-complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition. All courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than August 21, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of moving papers and reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES VS. MOHAMED ABDELFATTAH ET AL
